stemHtml: Blade angle decreases from the hub to the tip. How does the thrust of a basic propeller vary from root to tip?

options.a: Thrust increases away from the hub, where it is low, but reduces back to zero at the tip.
options.b: Thrust is low at the blade hub and high at the blade tip.
options.c: Thrust decreases away from the hub, where it is high, to the tip, where it is lowest.
options.d: Thrust is highest at the blade hub and tip.
